violations.description: Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. -Light shield missing in the dish washing area.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. The counter top under the toaster oven is missing the laminate on the edge near the stainless steel counter.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. The light over the sink in the kitchen was missing the shield.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
